mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE id = #{id} AND active = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND type = #{type}
AND (building = (SELECT p.name FROM resources p WHERE p.id = #{parentId} AND p.deleted = FALSE) OR floor = (SELECT p.name FROM resources p WHERE p.id = #{parentId} AND p.deleted = FALSE))
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR building LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR floor LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT * FROM resources WHERE type = #{type} AND active = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id

SELECT * FROM resources WHERE type = #{type} AND deleted = FALSE AND (building = (SELECT p.name FROM resources p WHERE p.id = #{parentId} AND p.deleted = FALSE) OR floor = (SELECT p.name FROM resources p WHERE p.id = #{parentId} AND p.deleted = FALSE)) ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM resources WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources (name, type, floor, building, capacity, description, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{floor}, #{building}, #{capacity}, #{description}, #{active}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, floor = #{floor}, building = #{building}, capacity = #{capacity}, description = #{description}, active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE resources SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
